statement: In every magma, Equation 3109 (`x = (((y * x) * x) * z) * y`) implies Equation 450 (`x = x * (y * (z * (y * x)))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0346
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op (op y x) x) z) y)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op x (op y (op z (op y x))))
